meaning: n.林间空地,一片表面有草的沼泽低地
examples: I'll be a lost glade in which unicorns still play.
Every book got a glade sticker above the call number.
Zuleika emerges from the water at the edge of a small glade.
The Glade Sexual Assault Referral Centre (SARC) offers services of evidence gathering and support with a 24-hour victim helpline.
Shakespeare's original is set in a mythic ancient-Greek glade of lush confusion.
